name: smartharvest-microservices
description: SmartHarvest Microservices - PLBK Universitas Syiah Kuala

scripts.install:all: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../harvest-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../matching-service && npm install && cd ../circular-service && npm install && cd ../dashboard-service && npm install && cd ../weather-service && npm install && cd ../chat-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd api-gateway && npm run dev" "cd user-service && npm run dev" "cd harvest-service && npm run dev" "cd order-service && npm run dev" "cd matching-service && npm run dev" "cd circular-service && npm run dev" "cd dashboard-service && npm run dev" "cd weather-service && npm run dev" "cd chat-service && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd api-gateway && npm start" "cd user-service && npm start" "cd harvest-service && npm start" "cd order-service && npm start" "cd matching-service && npm start" "cd circular-service && npm start" "cd dashboard-service && npm start" "cd weather-service && npm start" "cd chat-service && npm start"
